productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Black Top
description: Style NoteMake your own casual fashion rules with this black top from united colors of benetton. The unique design lends an exciting and diverse casual style while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and comfortable-yet-stylish footwear.Product DetailsBlack top, has an asymmetric  boat neck, kimono sleeves with ribbed cuffs, an asymmetric line from the neckline towards the left ribbed hemMaterial and Care100% viscoseMachine wash in 30 degrees with like colours using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
